creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
It seems I finally got it to build and run on HEAD, 10.0, 9.2 and 8.4.
All but HEAD was tested on Redports, HEAD was tested on three of my boxes.

Based on some ideas from lbartoletti tested on Redports in the last two
days, I again modified my Makefile. Python functionality was tested with
integrated python console and some python extensions.

Changes against my previous patch are:

- qscintilla dependency added (taken from lbartoletti)
- reorder py-qt4-xml dep (taken from lbartoletti)
- in OPTION PYTHON run dependency graphics/py-gdal added
- libexecinfo problem is gone, so patches in files/ removed
- now also OPTION PYTHON as default, it's working again

I decided to hold on my way of GITHUB entries for fetching the distfile,
instead of using lbartoletti's way

MASTER_SITES=   https://github.com/${PORTNAME}/QGIS/archive/
	 	DISTNAME=       final-2_2_0
WRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/QGIS-${DISTNAME}

That is, because I like the naming scheme produced by GITHUB much more:

qgis-2.2.0.tar.gz   instead of    final-2_2_0.zip
